What we offer

Three world-class hunts, one ranch

Sept 1 – Nov 29
Colorado Elk
Average 5-point bulls with multiple 6-point harvests each season in the rugged Colorado Rockies.
Learn more
160–190 Boone & Crockett
Mule Deer
Colorado's finest mule deer country. Average bucks 160–170 class, with trophy 185–190 taken recently.
Learn more
100% success rate
Pronghorn Antelope
Herds of 100 or more roaming open ranch land. Mid-to-high 70s pronghorns with unmatched access.
Learn more
28 mi
West of Steamboat Springs
The Smith Rancho difference

The Rocky Mountain experience you've been waiting for

Smith Rancho is part of Big Gulch Ranching for Wildlife — a program that gives us an extended season and guaranteed tags on 57,000 privately owned acres. You won't find this kind of access anywhere else in Colorado.

No draw required Licenses are guaranteed — skip the application process entirely.
Private land only 57,000 exclusive acres, 10 miles north of Hayden, Colorado.
Extended season Hunt for 90 days across all three species — far longer than public-land seasons.
On-site accommodations Stay at the ranch headquarters — no long drives to camp every morning.
Life at Smith Rancho

A real working ranch in the heart of Colorado

★★★★★

"You will see more elk than you have ever seen before — unless you have hunted with us in the past. A hunting experience that will never be forgotten in the beautiful Rocky Mountains."
